/usr/bin/g++-13 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/approbot_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/approbot_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/build/Desktop-Debug/.rcc/qrc_qmake_robot.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/build/Desktop-Debug/.rcc/qmlcache/approbot_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/build/Desktop-Debug/.rcc/qmlcache/approbot_Main_qml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/build/Desktop-Debug/.rcc/qmlcache/approbot_RectangleComponent_qml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/approbot.dir/build/Desktop-Debug/.rcc/qrc_approbot_raw_qml_0.cpp.o" -o approbot  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
